description: Verified header links across multiple pages; found intermittent typos in 'Portfolio' (/portfoloi) and 'Contact' (/contcat) links leading to 404 errors, while other links (Home, Blog, Videos) functioned correctly.

issues.name: Portfolio link typo in header (/portfoloi)
issues.description: Expected: The 'portfolio' link should always point to '/portfolio'. Actual: The 'portfolio' link occasionally points to '/portfoloi' instead of '/portfolio', leading to a 404 page.
reproductionSteps: Check the 'portfolio' link in the header.
Observe it occasionally points to '/portfoloi' instead of '/portfolio'.
issues.expectedBehavior: The 'portfolio' link should always point to '/portfolio'.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'portfolio' link occasionally points to '/portfoloi' instead of '/portfolio', leading to a 404 page.

issues.name: Contact link typo in header (/contcat)
issues.description: Expected: The 'contact' link should always point to '/contact'. Actual: The 'contact' link occasionally points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact', leading to a 404 page.
reproductionSteps: Check the 'contact' link in the header.
Observe it occasionally points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact'.
issues.expectedBehavior: The 'contact' link should always point to '/contact'.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'contact' link occasionally points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact', leading to a 404 page.
